name: child-obsidian-reserve/featured-fleet
title: Featured Fleet Showcase
description: A featured car section with a large hero item and a grid of secondary vehicles.

mainTitle.default: The Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II — The Ultimate Corporate Saloon.

mainDescription.default: The C-suite standard for luxury travel and board transfers. Commanding presence, exceptional rear-cabin silence, and our Exact Model Guarantee on every reservation.

default.title: Mercedes-Benz S-Class — The Industry-Standard Executive Saloon.
default.description: The default for senior executives and high-profile client hospitality. Exceptional rear-cabin legroom, privacy glass, and the Exact Model Guarantee for single-day or weekly corporate hire.

default.title: Range Rover Autobiography — The Flagship Executive SUV.
default.description: Full-size executive SUV for site visits, mount resort hospitality, and multi-passenger board transit. Privacy glass is fitted as standard. Exact Model Guarantee on every booking.

default.title: Mercedes-Benz V-Class — Premium Seven-People Carrier.
default.description: Seven-seat executive layout for group event transit, roadshow logistics, and VIP group transfers. Business class rear seating available.
